ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "onset" REAL /* Time when the stimulus starts (in seconds) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stimulus (in seconds) */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., rocknroll, symphonic) */,
  "run" INTEGER /* Identifier for the run the trial belongs to */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the run */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the experimenter who conducted the trial */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trial started */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations during the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experimenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("experimenter_id") REFERENCES experimenters ("experimenter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stimulus */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial this stimulus is associated with */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume level of the stimulus */,
  "run_volume" INTEGER /* Volume level during the run */,
  "stim_file" TEXT /* File name of the stimulus sound */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the stimulus */,
  "bpm" INTEGER /* Beats per minute of the stimulus */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the sound file */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth of the sound file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or metadata about the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the session the participant is involved in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "music_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience with music */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Any health conditions that might affect the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "experimenter" TEXT /* Name of the experimenter conducting the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response is associated with */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the response */,
  "emotion_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of emotional response (scale 1-10) */,
  "cognitive_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of cognitive response (scale 1-10) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the variable is associated with */,
  "delay" INTEGER /* Delay before the stimulus presentation (in seconds) */,
  "catch" INTEGER /* Catch variable to indicate special conditions */,
  "sound_soa" REAL /* Sound onset asynchrony (in seconds) */,
  "trigger_ts" REAL /* Timestamp of the trigger event (in milliseconds) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the variables */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimenters" (
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimenter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the experimenter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the experimenter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the experimenter */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the experimenter is affiliated with */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the experimenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "emotional_rating" INTEGER /* Overall emotional rating based on trials */,
  "cognitive_rating" INTEGER /* Overall cognitive rating based on trials */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the log is associated with */,
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimenter who logged the entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the experiment */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., error, info, warning) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experimenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("experimenter_id") REFERENCES experimenters ("experimenter_id")
)
